title: Battery Energy Storage Systems — Six-Month Moratorium and Working Group
summary: Jake Dishaw (deputy commissioner, code enforcement and zoning) presents item 43: a citywide six-month moratorium on battery energy storage systems (BESS). City Planning Commission held a public workshop; an internal working group from multiple departments is developing local regulatory standards. Discussion of outreach to National Grid and external organizations, though potential conflict of interest noted since the city would be evaluating National Grid's equipment. Council members Dr. Chol Majok and Rasheada Caldwell volunteer to join the working group. Councilor Nave raises saline batteries as a safer alternative to lithium.
